message:
feat(sql): add PERCENT_RANK, CUME_DIST, and frame-aware window functions

- Add PERCENT_RANK and CUME_DIST window ranking functions
- Implement _getFrameBounds helper for frame specification handling
- Make SUM/AVG/COUNT/MIN/MAX window functions frame-aware
- Fix LAST_VALUE to respect frame bounds
- Fix _hasAggregatesInSelect to skip window functions (was incorrectly
  treating AVG(...) OVER (...) as GROUP BY aggregate)
- Support ROWS BETWEEN with UNBOUNDED PRECEDING/FOLLOWING, CURRENT ROW,
  and N PRECEDING/FOLLOWING bounds
